Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector.Collector

Packages that use Collector
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.

  • Uses of Collector in org.moeaframework

    Methods in org.moeaframework with parameters of type Collector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Instrumenter
    Instrumenter.attach(Collector collector)
    Includes the specified collector when instrumenting algorithms.
    Method parameters in org.moeaframework with type arguments of type Collector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    Instrumenter.instrument(Algorithm algorithm, InstrumentedExtension extension, List<Collector> collectors, Set<Object> visited, Stack<Object> parents, Object object, Class<?> type)
    Recursively walks the object graph to 1) determine the nesting of objects to help determine which objects are to be instrumented; and 2) attach the Collectors to any matching objects.

  • Uses of Collector in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector

    Classes in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector that implement Collector
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveMultimethodVariationCollector
    Collects the individual operator probabilities from AdaptiveMultimethodVariation.
    class 
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationCollector
    Deprecated.
    Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtensionCollector instead
    class 
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtensionCollector
    Collects the number of restart events resulting from AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension.
    class 
    ApproximationSetCollector
    Collects approximation sets from an Algorithm.
    class 
    ElapsedTimeCollector
    Collects the elapsed execution time of an algorithm.
    class 
    EpsilonProgressCollector
    Collects the number of ε-progress improvements detected in an EpsilonBoxEvolutionaryAlgorithm.
    class 
    IndicatorCollector
    Collects performance indicator values from an Algorithm.
    class 
    PopulationCollector
    Collects the population from an EvolutionaryAlgorithm.
    class 
    PopulationSizeCollector
    Collects the population size and archive size, if available, from an EvolutionaryAlgorithm.
    class 
    PSOCollector
    Collects the population from an AbstractPSOAlgorithm.

    Returns a new instance of this collector which has been attached to the specified object as identified by the attach point returned through getAttachPoint().

    InstrumentedAlgorithm.addCollector(Collector collector)
